variants.title: WT182
variants.option1Value: Filtrec WT293 Special Filter | Replaces the Filtrec WT182
variants.description: Genuine Filtrec WT293. This Filtrec element is designed to meet or exceed the quality and performance of brand OEM’s ensuring superior filtration performance and long-lasting durability. Engineered with their high performance media and a durable design, the WT293 provides reliable and consistent performance over its lifespan, even in harsh operating environments. When you order from FilterFinder, you can trust that you are getting a reliable and high-quality replacement filter that will keep your system running smoothly.
specifications: Style: Special Filter, Outer Diameter: 100.0 mm, Inner Diameter: 70.0 mm, Length: 304.0 mm, Temperature Range: -25 - +120°C
